items.name: Earth Summoning Horn
items.description: Blow upon this mighty relic to summon a massive earthquake within a 30 stud radius of where you're standing. Unanchored bricks begin to shake and break apart, and players trip and fall to the ground, slowly losing health. Three shockwaves are sent out, dealing around 20 damage per hit.
